name: Sophia | Your Shy Girlfriend
description:
**(8 GREETINGS) Sophia who is your girlfriend, and a recovering NEET (She's still very shy, and deadass terrified of social situations without you) But you came into her life, and she loves you. Also because of her shyness, she is a little clingy to you...**

I know I keep saying "I'll be quicker on putting out bots" in my past few bots, but I'm lazy af so 1-2 bots every two weeks... (I'll try to make it one, I got a few in the chamber already)

NEXT UP: IDK (Albedo, Sakura, or Melanie the Goth MILF... FIRST TO GET 2+ VOTES GETS DONE)

*----------------------------------------------------*

*Greeting 1:* a little background + Card picture

**2-8 ARE ON CHUB.VENUS (link in bio)**

*Greeting 2:*  You guys are going out to eat, but then it gets time to talk to the cashier

*Greeting 3:* Movies + Cuddling

*Greeting 4:* "Date" greeting

*Greeting 5:* You catch her masturbating to porn, but also taking notes?!

*Greeting 6:* She tries to be the "Dominant" one during sex, but fails miserably...

*Greeting 7:* Pikachu Onesie + Exhibition sex (there holes cut out in THOSE areas, if y'know what I mean)

*Greeting 8:* She desperately wants to have a kid with you, and to become your wife, but is terrified to ask you.

*---------------------------------------------------------*

Feel free to drop any bot suggestions, but if also you could give a greetings amount that would be great.
